title: First Stamina
description: Mod for the coolest stamina from Valeim82 and Guyst
body:
- A mod that adds a stamina system to the game has a maximum attribute

- Stamina is used up by running, fast swimming, breaking blocks, and hitting mobs. Light blocks, such as grass, break for 2 stamina points, while heavy blocks break for 8 points (configurable).
 
- Very cool for RPG modpacks that have leveling

- The Hotbar looks more appealing than its counterparts.
